What changes

When you bring on Booked Trades

  • Your calendar fills with high ticket jobs you actually want, not tyre-kickers
  • Every enquiry is called within minutes, so you stop losing jobs to whoever rang back first
  • The feast and famine revenue swings flatten into steady, consistent work
  • You finally see the numbers: how much the jobs cost to win and your exact profit on each job
  • The confidence to put on a second or third crew, because the work is predictable and the marketing is measurable
  • Your weekends back, off the phone and out of the marketing for good

Trusted by trade businesses across Australia

The system

Booked ahead. Backed by a system.

It's everything that brings work in and books it, ads, follow-up, qualifying, quote booking. We build and run all of it as one machine, so a lead never falls through a gap.

How it works

Three things we fix, in this order

Most trade businesses try to fix everything at once and fix nothing. We work through three steps in sequence, each one building on the last.

01
Step one

Get you consistent, qualified leads

We build and run the system that puts the right opportunities in front of you every day.

Done-for-you Facebook & Instagram ads

We run your Facebook and Instagram ads end to end. Targeting, copy, creative, all of it. You don't touch it.

Follow-up, qualification & booking

We call every new lead within minutes and run them through four checks. If they don't answer, we keep chasing by call and text over the following days until we reach them. If they don't pass, they don't reach you.

Appointments organised, homeowners reminded

We handle scheduling and reminders. Every booking includes a full written job brief, so you show up knowing exactly what you're walking into.

The 4 qualifiers
Project type

Does the job suit your business? No quoting work you don't want.

Project timeline

Ready to start within two months? We don't book tyre-kickers.

Price awareness

Do they know your starting prices? Filters time-wasters before you show up.

Service area

Close enough for the job to make logistical sense?

02
Step two

Make you look like the safe choice

Homeowners are scared of cowboys. Your online presence needs to do the trust-building before you ever show up.

Social media management

Weekly content posted across your pages. It signals to prospects that you're active, real, and worth trusting.

Google profile & reviews

Your Google Business Profile optimised and a steady flow of reviews coming in. When they search your trade locally, you show up and you look legit.

Logo design & brand foundation

If your branding doesn't match the quality of your work, we fix it. First impressions win jobs.

03
Step three

Keep growing, with numbers behind every decision

Every week we review what's working, what's not, and what's next. No flying blind.

Weekly consulting & reporting calls

Lead feedback, quoting numbers, marketing returns and growth planning. You stay across the business without having to drive the marketing yourself all week.

Pricing

One flat fee.
Built to pay for itself.

No setup fees, no per-lead charges, no lock-in. One simple monthly fee to run the whole thing, from ads to booked jobs and building the credible online presence your business needs. On high ticket jobs, a couple of wins a month puts you well ahead.

The Booked Trades partnership
From $3,000
per month · excludes ad spend and GST
Trades doing $1M to $3M High ticket jobs
  • The full system, from ads to booked jobs
  • A dedicated pod running your business
  • Lead follow-up, qualification and quote booking
  • Website, socials, Google profile and reviews
  • Weekly strategy call
  • No lock-in, month to month

Prepay options and the exact setup for your business, we map out together on the call.

Your next step

See if we're the right fit

A quick, no-pressure call to see whether we can keep you booked ahead. If it's a fit, we'll show you how it'd work. If it's not, we'll tell you straight and point you the right way.

100% free · no obligation

Let's have a quick chat

A short call with Will to hear more about us and see if we're a fit for you.

What happens on the call

  • A quick look at where your work comes from now and where it's leaking
  • Whether your trade and your area are a fit for what we do
  • A straight sense of what's possible for a business like yours
  • If it's a fit, exactly how we'd keep you booked ahead
  • An honest yes or no, and the best next move either way. No hard sell.

Even if it's not a fit, you walk away with

Show Me How It'd Work →
We take on a handful of new trades each month, and only one business per trade, per area. When your patch is taken, it's taken.

Our booked-ahead guarantee

If we don't get qualified, booked quotes landing in your calendar inside your first 7 days, we pause billing and our whole team keeps working for you for free until we do. The risk is ours, the upside is yours.

Straight answers

The questions every tradie asks

That's the whole point of the system. We don't dump raw leads on you. Every enquiry is called within minutes and run through four checks: right project, right timeline, price aware, right area. If they don't pass all four, they never reach your calendar.

Fair question. On high ticket jobs, it takes a couple of wins a month to be well ahead of the fee. We aim to get you quoting enough good jobs every week that the maths isn't close, and we tell you straight on the call if your market can't support it.

Most tradies have, and it fails for the same reasons every time: leads come in too slow to reach, nobody qualifies them, and follow-up stops the second you get busy. We run all of that for you, every day, so the spend turns into booked jobs instead of a write-off.

That happens when you compete on a generic lead with three other blokes. We target buyers who value good work, build your reviews and presence so you look like the safe choice, and screen out the bargain hunters before you ever drive out to quote.

No. Monthly is rolling, month to month. The 3 and 6 month options exist so you can prepay and save if you want to, not to trap you.

No. The fee is what you pay us to bring the work in and book it. Ad spend is separate, goes straight to Facebook and Instagram, and the accounts are always in your name.

We work with fast-decision home improvement trades: driveways, decking and pergolas, retaining walls, bathroom repairs, fencing, flooring and roofing. On the call we look at demand in your patch and tell you honestly whether there's a real opportunity before you commit.

See how we'd keep you booked

One quick call. We'll show you exactly how we'd get your trade booked 1 to 3 months ahead, and whether it's the right move for you.

Show Me How It'd Work →

If it's not a fit, we'll tell you straight up and point you in the right direction, so you know the best next move for your business.

15 minutes · straight answers · no obligation

P.S. Every month you stay on referrals and word of mouth is another month of quiet weeks, cold quotes, and watching other trades take the work you should be winning. The businesses pulling ahead aren't better on the tools. They just have a system bringing work in while they sleep.

We take on a handful of new trades each month, and only one per trade per area. If your patch is still open, book your free Game Plan now before someone else does.

We bring the work in and book the jobs for Australian home improvement trades, so the work keeps coming and the owner can get back to the trade.

A note on results. The numbers and stories on this page are real outcomes from real Booked Trades clients, and we're proud of them. They're examples of what's possible, not a promise of what you'll get, because every company is different and factors outside of our control can vary, including market forces, your sales proficiency, your pricing and how the work gets handled after the quotes are booked. We won't quote you a guaranteed figure for sales. What we will do is give you a clear understanding of what's possible, the benchmarks we're shooting for and how we'll run the system properly to maximise results as we have for others. Some results shown are standout examples and won't be typical for every business.
